nasb.text: I will scatter to every wind all who are around him, his helpers and all his troops; and I will draw out a sword after them.

esv.text: And I will scatter toward every wind all who are around him, his helpers and all his troops, and I will unsheathe the sword after them.

cnv.text: 我要把他周圍所有的人，就是所有幫助他的和他所有的軍隊，分散到四方去，也要拔出刀來追趕他們。

ccb.text: 我要把他周围的随从和所有军队驱散到四方，并且拔刀追杀他们。
